meta.title: Sowing the Future
meta.description: Sowing the Future LP — turning ideas into reality

howItWorks.title: HOW DOES IT WORK?
howItWorks.step1: An OSTEN customer acquires NFTs tied to a family farmer's property in the municipalities of Iranduba, Canutama, or Rio Preto da Eva.
howItWorks.step2: OSTEN subsidizes the program by purchasing the same number of NFTs acquired by the customer.
howItWorks.step3: The customer can track the progress of their planting through the NFT on the platform.
howItWorks.step4: In this way, both OSTEN customers and the OSTEN Group help drive social and environmental sustainability on the planet.

infoCards.nftsIssued: For each tree seedling purchased, NFTs are issued to the OSTEN customer who joins the program.
infoCards.cost: Each NFT costs R$90 and funds the maintenance of one seedling for 5 years.

about.title: Sustainable NFT
about.h3: Plant a tree. Grow a future.
about.p1: The OSTEN Program is more than an environmental project — it is a gesture of hope.
about.p2: Each NFT represents a real seedling planted in the Amazon, supporting family farming and protecting what we can still save.
about.p3: Alongside HOPE GREEN, we unite innovation and purpose to generate income for local communities, preserve traditions, and keep alive the forest that sustains the world.
about.p4: With every contribution, you don’t just plant a tree — you strengthen families, build a legacy, and tell the future: "We care".
about.p5: Join us. Because the future is built now — one tree at a time.

overview.title: GBR NFT SHOWCASE
overview.body: Want to see some NFTs? View here the first NFTs acquired by OSTEN for the project.

buy.title: BUY HERE
buy.body: Start investing today in the Amazon’s tomorrow by supporting Family Farming.

myNfts.title: VIEW YOUR PURCHASED NFTs
myNfts.body: Connect your wallet and annually track the development of the seedlings represented by your NFTs.
